cit.basis: ISLR (Ley de Impuesto sobre la Renta) Tarifa 2, progressive in Tax Units (UT); this SME estimator models the top band as a flat rate.
cit.note: Tarifa 2 is progressive in Tax Units (UT): 15% up to 2,000 UT, 22% from 2,000 to 3,000 UT, 34% above 3,000 UT. The bolivar value of the UT is re-fixed administratively and shifts with hyperinflation, so the lower UT brackets cover a negligible slice of real-world profit; the estimator applies the 34% top band. Banking/insurance are taxed at 40% and hydrocarbons (Tarifa 3) at 50%. Verify the current UT value with SENIAT.

inflation_adjustment.note: Fiscal inflation adjustment (Ajuste por Inflacion / Reajuste Regular por Inflacion, API/RPA) revalues non-monetary assets and equity for tax purposes; excluded from this estimator. Financial-sector and special taxpayers have been excluded from the adjustment by reform.

vat.note: IVA standard rate 16%; the law allows a general band of 8%-16.5% set by the Executive, with reduced rates for certain goods and an additional rate (up to 15 percentage points extra) on luxury goods and services, plus a surtax band for payments in foreign currency/crypto.

municipal_business_tax.note: Municipalities levy a gross-receipts business activity tax (Impuesto a las Actividades Economicas) at locally set rates; out of scope.

official_sources.name: SENIAT (Servicio Nacional Integrado de Administracion Aduanera y Tributaria)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
UT-denominated brackets, the fiscal inflation adjustment (API/RPA), municipal turnover taxes, and sector-specific regimes may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
